section.title: AlgoJson Class Reference

para.para: The AlgoJson class provides a static method to format algorithm statistics into JSON.

listitem.para: static std::string FormatAlgoStats (string msgtype, std::string source, int enabled, std::string templatename, std::string uniqueid, std::string text, std::string name, std::string symb, std::string exch, double pos, double totalexec)

section.title: Detailed Description
section.para: The AlgoJson class provides a static method to format algorithm statistics into JSON.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation
FormatAlgoStats() FormatAlgoStatsAlgoJson AlgoJsonFormatAlgoStats
static std::string AlgoJson::FormatAlgoStats (string msgtype, std::string source, int enabled, std::string templatename, std::string uniqueid, std::string text, std::string name, std::string symb, std::string exch, double pos, double totalexec)[inline], [static]
Formats algorithm statistics into JSON.
Parameters
msgtype
The message type.
source
The source.
enabled
The enabled flag.
templatename
The template name.
uniqueid
The unique ID.
text
The text.
name
The instance name.
symb
The symbol.
exch
The exchange.
pos
The position.
totalexec
The total execution.
Returns
The formatted JSON string.
